summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. entered into an underwriting agreement to issue senior unsecured notes.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp., a subsidiary of Bunge Global SA, agreed to issue and sell three tranches of senior unsecured notes for funding purposes.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. agreed to issue and sell three tranches of senior unsecured notes for $400 million, $800 million, and $800 million respectively.

extraction_notes: Numbers are in millions of USD; filing did not disclose specific segment performance or leadership changes.
